title: cryptandra exserta
intro: Cryptandra exserta, a shrub native to Australia, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Epacridaceae. This plant has been used traditionally in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptandra exserta include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as providing relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Cryptandra exserta include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
